name: conflux
description: Conflux integration — read and write thoughts, session context, and agent handoff notes in Claude Code

hooks.prompt: SILENTLY check: did you just complete significant work (multi-file change, bug fix, feature, or code review) in this turn? If yes, write a 1-3 sentence summary via `conflux think "summary" --agent-name claude-code --trigger task_complete`. If trivial, do nothing. Do NOT output any text about this decision.
